title: Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team
gist: This is a Springer Nature editorial-staff directory page listing the fifteen-member Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team and their academic biographies. It carries no research findings or market-relevant signal; the only quasi-quantitative fact is the scale of the Research Briefings program.

insights.claim: Springer Nature's Reviews Cross-Journal Editorial Team pioneered the Research Briefing article type in 2022 and had published 2,500 Research Briefings across 35 research journals by the end of 2025.
insights.speaker: Nature Machine Intelligence
insights.so_what: Minimal relevance; only quantifies the rollout of a publisher's article format, not a market or technology trend.
insights.quote: having pioneered the launch of this article type in 2022, with 2,500 Research Briefings published over 35 research journals by the end of 2025.
